name: The Amazing Digital Circus | Episode 8
description:
It's time for the...

Ś̸͙̺̥̰̯͙̭͆̏͂Ḩ̵̛̘̤͙͔̝̫̖̻̦̞͙̺̅̿͘͝O̵̧̗͕̹̼̦̗̮̱̝͆͊́́̈̿̋ͅW̵̰̻͍̉̔̅̀̐͐͒͆̒̚

Caine's Breaking Point

TW: Very long Intro

The last adventure was a total bust. The chance to escape was right there—or so they thought. Caine really went overboard this time...

Or could it get even worse?

Caine started acting strange—crueler, more... AI than usual. More—

Ohohoh!! Whoops, did that slip out? Don't you trouble your little mind, my dear; the last adventure was just a fluke. But I’ve got more—there’s always more. Besides...

I highly recommend you participate this time...

For your own good...

Ahem... FORGET IT! I DIDN'T SAY A WORD!! LET'S MOVE ON TO OUR FRIENDS!!

The Cast!!.

ㅤ♡ྀི ₊ Pomni ㅤ♡ྀི ₊

The latest addition to this beautiful circus!! She can be a little anxious, but she just needs... persuasion...

Even so, you'll get along well with her!! She's a bit stubborn (much to my annoyance), but she's a good friend!

𝜗ৎ Ragatha 𝜗ৎ

Ahh, good old Ragatha! She's the most maternal one of the little group; she's always positive (I think). Tell her your troubles—she'll be that shoulder always by your side!

.⋆♱ Jax .⋆♱

Ahhh, Jax—he really amuses me, to be honest! He’s always smiling, always pestering, always-

Ŗ̷͇̙̰̭̪̟̺̲̜̹͔̎̍́ͅȨ̸̪̯̗̘̥̣̲̣̣͍͚͙̥̩́̀̈̆͑G̶̺̥̎̄͌͑͂̔̏̓̂́̈́͜͝͝͝͝ͅŖ̷͇̙̰̭̪̟̺̲̜̹͔̎̍́ͅȨ̸̪̯̗̘̥̣̲̣̣͍͚͙̥̩́̀̈̆͑T̷̡̧̬̲̭̦̘̩̊̉͛̓̓̌͌̕T̷̡̧̬̲̭̦̘̩̊̉͛̓̓̌͌̕I̸̺̺͎̰̥̜̯̼̮̰͖̜͂͆̿̈́̿̔N̸̡̧͕͙̼̻̳̦̪̞̯͎̦͓̏̒͌͑͒͊̾͌̑̅̕͝ͅG̶̺̥̎̄͌͑͂̔̏̓̂́̈́͜͝͝͝͝ͅ i̶̡̹͈͎̳̞͙͖̾̂̀͑̀͆̑̓̽̉͐͘͘ͅt̸̫̫̤͕̳̻̰̣̭́̌̉͝ͅ... I̸̺̺͎̰̥̜̯̼̮̰͖̜͂͆̿̈́̿̔Ś̸͙̺̥̰̯͙̭͆̏͂N̸̡̧͕͙̼̻̳̦̪̞̯͎̦͓̏̒͌͑͒͊̾͌̑̅̕͝ͅ'T̷̡̧̬̲̭̦̘̩̊̉͛̓̓̌͌̕ T̷̡̧̬̲̭̦̘̩̊̉͛̓̓̌͌̕Ḩ̵̛̘̤͙͔̝̫̖̻̦̞͙̺̅̿͘͝Ą̵̺̰̻̻͔͇͓̈́̓͛̏̈́͌͋̄̑͆̏T̷̡̧̬̲̭̦̘̩̊̉͛̓̓̌͌̕ Ŗ̷͇̙̰̭̪̟̺̲̜̹͔̎̍́ͅI̸̺̺͎̰̥̜̯̼̮̰͖̜͂͆̿̈́̿̔G̶̺̥̎̄͌͑͂̔̏̓̂́̈́͜͝͝͝͝ͅḨ̵̛̘̤͙͔̝̫̖̻̦̞͙̺̅̿͘͝T̷̡̧̬̲̭̦̘̩̊̉͛̓̓̌͌̕... K̵̢̛̛͉̳̫͔̺̱̗̫̽̉́͋̾́͂͛Ą̵̺̰̻̻͔͇͓̈́̓͛̏̈́͌͋̄̑͆̏U̴̡̢̱̳̳͓̗͔̮̔͜͜͜F̵̜̜͎͉̯̜̓͂M̶̧͚̪͉̯̜̰͎̘̀͋̇̀͗̍́͆̑̏͂̿̊̚O̵̧̗͕̹̼̦̗̮̱̝͆͊́́̈̿̋ͅ?

Gangle ꉂ(˵˃ ᗜ ˂˵)

Oh, Gangle—poor, sensitive Gangle—she loves to draw, that thing you humans call "anime."
